ModuleAnchor.helper: Used to create #anchor-links on the page (numbers, letters, hyphens only).

LinkCards.helper: Add up to 4 cards. Cards display in the order shown here. If more than 4 are added, only the first 4 are rendered.

Title.helper: Short heading shown on the card.

Description.helper: Keep this short for the best layout.

Url.helper: Choose the destination for this card.

FontAwesomeIcon.helper: FontAwesome Free class. Example: fa-solid fa-tree

BackgroundImage.helper: Recommended: landscape image, ideally at least 1600px wide.
